description: This Kotlin source file defines the application's main class 'SecureSampleApp', which extends Android's Application class. It manages app-wide components such as token storage, authentication, network API client, and crash handling, including setup of uncaught exception handlers and safe mode configuration.

classes.name: SecureSampleApp
classes.description: Main application class that handles initialization, crash handling, and safe mode configuration for the app.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes crash handlers, configures safe mode, and sets up app components such as token store, auth manager, and API client.

methods.name: recordInitFailureIfEmpty
methods.description: Logs initialization failure messages if not already set, assisting in crash diagnostics and UI handling.

methods.name: getOrCreateApiClient
methods.description: Lazily creates and returns the API client if not in preview safe mode.
